commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens plugin/runtime schema, metadata, provider, approval, Codex app-server, channel, and outbound-action boundaries with guarded reads and synthetic fuzz regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the new compatibility walker returns no issue for non-plain objects with no enumerable keys, and plugin config schema normalization then spreads those objects into empty schemas. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
